case_title: ARANA, LIZETTE VS PNS TOWING & RECOVERY AND OWNER PETER.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY ARANA, LIZETTE AS TO DEFENDANT PNS TOWING & RECOVERY AND OWNER PETER. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARANA, LIZETTE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PNS TOWING & RECOVERY AND OWNER PETER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
